headline: Benchmark Starts ServiceNow (NOW) at $125 Target on Workflow AI Strength
summary: ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is among the 13 Best Strong Buy AI Stocks to Invest In Now. On April 1, Benchmark analyst Yi Fu Lee initiated coverage of ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) with a Buy rating and a $125 price target, highlighting the company’s integrated platform combining AI, data, and workflow automation. The analyst views ServiceNow as a key […]
